l1: This discipline is under active development — probing commands will be added by the User Experience tech lead.
To contribute diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Microsoft-Windows-User Profile Service/Operational | Select -First 20 | Format-List'
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced probing will be added by the User Experience tech lead.
To contribute advanced diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-WinEvent -LogName Microsoft-Windows-GroupPolicy/Operational | Where Id -in 4000,4001,4016,4017 | Select -First 20 | Format-List'

l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the User Experience tech lead.
To contribute resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'gpupdate /force' to refresh Group Policy and resolve many logon and profile issues.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the User Experience tech lead.
To contribute advanced resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'gpresult /h C:\gpo_report.html' and open in browser to identify denied or conflicting Group Policy objects.

l1: This discipline is under active development — data collection steps will be added by the User Experience tech lead.

Export User Profile Service log: 'wevtutil epl Microsoft-Windows-User Profile Service/Operational C:\UPS_Events.evtx'
